items.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
items.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，Claude 生态持续扩展。

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
items.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.
